entries.definition:
ṣ-b-w youth, youthfulness, youthful propensity. Of this root, two forms occur three times in the Qurʾan: أَصْبُو ʾaṣbū once and صَبِيًّا sabiyyan twice.
أصبو ʾaṣbū [imperf. of v. صبا ṣabā, intrans.] to feel sensual desire towards, to yearn for, to incline towards, to lust for (12:33) وَإِلَّا تَصْرِفْ عَنِّي كَيْدَهُنَّ أَصْبُ إِلَيْهِنَّ وَأَكُن مِّنَ الْجَاهِلِينَ but if you do not avert

511
